failedAssertions.reason: Read-scoped API key in MCP remote mode could still call submit_spike successfully; expected scope-denied MCP error.
npx spikes-mcp clean first-run still returns HTTP 404 for aarch64-apple-darwin download, preventing MCP server initialize.

appliedUpdates.description: Added rerun guidance that namespace login users default to free tier and must be set to agent for budget-cap MCP assertions.
Documented local wrapper-validation fallback: use npm pack + npx --package <tarball> spikes-mcp when registry package is unavailable.
